mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.agent_company_id, s.outsource_task_id, s.score_timeliness, s.score_quality, s.score_communication, s.score_issue, s.scorer_id, s.remark, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name, pt.task_name, p.project_name, su.real_name AS scorer_name FROM agent_score_log s LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = s.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN outsource_task t ON t.id = s.outsource_task_id AND t.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_task pt ON pt.id = t.task_id AND pt.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = s.scorer_id AND su.deleted = 0 WHERE s.agent_company_id = #{companyId} AND s.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT AVG( (IFNULL(score_timeliness, 0) * 0.30) + (IFNULL(score_quality, 0) * 0.30) + (IFNULL(score_communication, 0) * 0.20) + (IFNULL(score_issue, 0) * 0.20) ) FROM agent_score_log WHERE agent_company_id = #{companyId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT s.id, s.agent_company_id, s.outsource_task_id, s.score_timeliness, s.score_quality, s.score_communication, s.score_issue, s.scorer_id, s.remark, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name, pt.task_name, p.project_name, su.real_name AS scorer_name FROM agent_score_log s LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = s.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN outsource_task t ON t.id = s.outsource_task_id AND t.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_task pt ON pt.id = t.task_id AND pt.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = s.scorer_id AND su.deleted = 0 WHERE s.outsource_task_id = #{taskId} AND s.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
